title: Write ferrum_extlib_anim.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_anim: animation engine with curves and spring physics. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: float value animation over time, easing curves (linear, ease-in, ease-out, ease-in-out), spring physics, animation sequences, parallel groups, stagger, event-loop driven timer integration, widget state animation, frame interpolation.
